author: gb9t
content: Iter 59 result: kernel/futex/core.md (Fast Userspace Mutex - core.c ~2015 + futex.h + waitwake.c + requeue.c + pi.c; per-(mm, addr) FutexKey + per-bucket plist waitqueue + FUTEX_WAIT/WAKE/REQUEUE/LOCK_PI/UNLOCK_PI ops + PI rt_mutex backend + robust-list per-task cleanup + FUTEX_REQUEUE_PI for cond-var broadcast) + virt/kvm/x86-smm.md (KVM SMM emulation - smm.c ~663 + smm.h ~171; SMI entry save_state_32/_64 + RSM exit load_state_32/_64 + per-vCPU SMBASE relocation + per-VM SMRAM memslot + SMI/NMI priority + KVM_CAP_X86_SMM gating + OVMF secure-boot use-case). 68 Tier-3s total. Next iter: kernel/time/timer-wheel.md (timer.c timer wheel) + virt/kvm/x86-pvclock.md (kvm-clock paravirt timer).
